title: rosa pubescens
intro: Rosa pubescens, also known as the hairy rose or Indian rose, is a species of rose that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It is a deciduous shrub that is native to Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Rosa pubescens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
